ayahs.bm: Dengan Nama Allah yang Maha Pengasih lagi Maha Penyayang.
ayahs.en: In the name of God, Most Gracious, Most Merciful
By the sun and its brightness.
The sky and Him who built it.
The earth and Him who sustains it.
The soul and Him who created it.

ayahs.bm: Lalu ditunjukinya apa yang jahat dan apa yang baik.
ayahs.en: Then showed it what is evil and what is good.
Successful is one who redeems it.
Failing is one who neglects it.

ayahs.bm: Thamud tidak percaya lalu menjadikan mereka melampaui batasan.
ayahs.en: Thamûd's disbelief caused them to transgress.

ayahs.bm: Mereka mengikuti yang paling jahat dari kalangan mereka.
ayahs.en: They followed the worst among them.

ayahs.arabic: فَقَالَ لَهُمْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ نَاقَةَ اللَّهِ وَسُقْيَاهَا
ayahs.bm: Rasul Allah berkata kepada mereka, "Ini adalah unta Allah; biarkanlah dia minum."
ayahs.en: GOD's messenger said to them, "This is GOD's camel; let her drink."

ayahs.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَعَقَرُوهَا فَدَمْدَمَ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ بِذَنْبِهِمْ فَسَوَّاهَا
ayahs.bm: Mereka mengingkarinya dan menyembelihnya. Lalu Tuhan mereka membalas mereka kerana dosa dosa mereka dan menghapuskan mereka.
ayahs.en: They disbelieved him and slaughtered her. Their Lord then requited them for their sin and annihilated them.

ayahs.bm: Namun demikian, orang orang yang datang sesudah mereka masih tetap tidak mempedulikan.
ayahs.en: Yet, those who came after them remain heedless.
